channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Grass areas need attention, 13th June
item.description:
All of the grass areas on Chester Road need some maintenance, they are becoming overgrown and messy.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chester Road, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing litter bin, 13th June
item.description:
Rubbish strewn everywhere. Friends Group cleared some of it but the bin is still overflowing and dog owners are now leaving poo bags next to the bin as well.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 32, Kingswood Avenue, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bed base, mattress, cabinet, laundry basket, airer, toys etc, 13th June
item.description:
This is a regular occurrence and I have to report fly tipping every time I visit my brother. Please put a camera on this area and you will be able to see who is doing this all the time and you can prosecute or fine them. It is dangerous, unhygienic, unsightly and unneighbourly. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Herbert Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Untaxed SORN Vauxhall Zafira dumped on Barnfield Gardens public land, 13th June
item.description:
Near Spooner House. Yet another untaxed car dumped on the estate, taking away parking places for real residents. The culprit has also taken off the back number plate to make it more inconspicuous. All there as of 13th June 2026

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Barnfield Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped bin and bottles/rubbish around it, 13th June
item.description:
Obstructing pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Canon Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle, 13th June
item.description:
Abandoned vehicle

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Homefield Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Builders left building sand, 13th June
item.description:
Builders left building sand on grass verge for over a year. It it behind 10 The Oval,Sidcup

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Rutland Avenue, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Group of men working on on different cars all day on the public road causing noise and disturbance, 13th June
item.description:
It seems there is a group of men running a car fixing business from the public road. They have been doing this for the whole year. It sometimes causes disturbance.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 47, Kirkwood Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattresses dumped outside 16 Frederick Place, 13th June
item.description:
Photos taken 13th June 2026

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Frederick Place, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog waste bin down., 13th June
item.description:
Dog waste bin Ellenbrough rd entrance to Cray meadows lying on ground.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ellenborough Road, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Untaxed SORN Ford Fiesta (yes, 3 of them!) dumped on Barnfield Gardens public land, 13th June
item.description:
Photos taken 13th June 2026. Area is plagued with untaxed cars dumped on public land, another one here. Taking up space for residents who can’t park near their own home. Next to Maxwell House in Keeble Close. This isn’t even a valid parking space, why aren’t the council moving this?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Keeble Close, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Untaxed SORN Ford Fiesta (2nd one) dumped on Barnfield Gardens public land, 13th June
item.description:
Photos taken 13th June 2026. Area is plagued with untaxed cars dumped on public land, another one here. Taking up space for residents who can’t park near their own home. Next to Maxwell House in Keeble Close.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Barnfield Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No 16 bins obstructing pavement and hedge-unable to trim overgrown vegetation, 13th June
item.description:
Due to antisocial behaviour, the police advised us not to move these bins ourselves and to report the issue to the Council, as it is your responsibility to remove them or ensure they are stored outside the correct property. The bins are obstructing access to our hedge, which we cannot trim while they remain there. As Southwark has issued a notice requiring the hedge to be cut within 14 days, please arrange for the bins to be removed as soon as possible so we can carry out the work. Attached photo where bins used to be stored and where it should be

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Somerford Way, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Untaxed SORN Ford Fiesta dumped on Barnfield Gardens public land, 13th June
item.description:
Photos taken 13th June 2026. Area is plagued with untaxed cars dumped on public land, another one here. Taking up space for residents who can’t park near their own home. Next to Maxwell House in Keeble Close.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Barnfield Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Untaxed SORN Vauxhall Astra dumped in Barnfield Gardens next to Maxwell House, 13th June
item.description:
Photos taken 13th June 2026. Area is plagued with untaxed cars dumped on public land, another one here. Taking up space for residents who can’t park near their own home.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Barnfield Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Asbestos dumped in car park opposite 97-101 Bloomfield Road, 13th June
item.description:
Looks the same as what was also reported near Charlton Park a few weeks ago. Same person no doubt. Photos taken 11th June 2026

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Frederick Place, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing Bin, 13th June
item.description:
This bin has been overflowing for sometime rubbish is now spilling out of the bin into the footway posing a hazard

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hook Lane, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins of number 16 somerford way obstructing pavement and access to the hedge-unable to trim the overgrown vegetation, 13th June
item.description:
Due to antisocial behaviour, the police advised us not to move these bins ourselves and to report the issue to the Council, as it is your responsibility to remove them or ensure they are stored outside the correct property. The bins are obstructing access to our hedge, which we cannot trim while they remain there. As Southwark has issued a notice requiring the hedge to be cut within 14 days, please arrange for the bins to be removed as soon as possible so we can carry out the work

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Somerford Way, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Burrage Road, Plumstead
